global_description: A medium-sized bird with a sleek, streamlined body. Predominantly blue plumage with a lighter underbelly and white throat. The wings and tail are long and pointed, with a glossy texture. The beak is short and dark, and the legs are slender.

part_details.plumage: Bright blue on back and wings, lighter underbelly
part_details.wings: Long, pointed, blue with glossy texture

spatial_relations: The wings extend laterally from the body
The tail is positioned at the rear, extending backwards
The beak is located at the front of the head
The legs are positioned under the body
